# Stroom Performance - Full AI Context

> Stroom Performance is a direct-to-consumer performance-parts storefront for GM LS and Gen III Hemi builds. The first verified reference catalog covers four GM LS products. Shopify will own live variants, price, inventory, cart, customer, and order data when commerce is connected.

## Product and Content Model
- Product: manufacturer part number, brand, platform, system, racing styles, specifications, availability, and fitment.
- Category: system and racing-style facets used for product discovery.
- Fitment: application, required modifications, confidence, and combination-dependent notes.
- Guide: setup knowledge connected to relevant parts.
- Build: real-world context that shows how components work together.
- Shopify objects when live: Product, Variant, Cart, Customer, and Order.

## Platforms
### GM LS
The active reference assortment. Product fitment must be checked against the complete engine, induction, fuel, electronics, drivetrain, and vehicle combination.

### Gen III Hemi
The planned second platform. Do not invent product names, part numbers, pricing, or compatibility until client details are supplied.

## Verified Products
### PAC 1218 Beehive Valve Springs - /products/pac-1218-valve-springs
Manufacturer part number PAC-1218-16. Set of 16 ovate-wire beehive springs for compatible GM Gen III/IV LS valvetrains. Confirm cam lift, installed height, retainer, seat, and coil-bind clearance.

### BTR Stage 2 Turbo Camshaft V2 - /products/btr-stage-2-turbo-cam-v2
Manufacturer part number BTR-TURBOSTG2. Three-bolt hydraulic-roller camshaft for turbocharged Gen III/IV LS builds. Suitability depends on displacement, heads, turbo, compression, gearing, converter or clutch, weight, and use.

### BTR Equalizer 1 Intake Manifold - /products/btr-equalizer-1-intake
Manufacturer part number IMA-01. Cathedral-port cast-aluminum intake with a 102 mm throttle-body opening. Confirm accessory drive, throttle control, fuel rails, injectors, MAP sensor, and vehicle packaging.

### Holley Terminator X for GM LS1/LS6 - /products/holley-terminator-x-550-909t
Manufacturer part number 550-909T. Standalone EFI for compatible 24x crank, 1x cam, EV6 high-impedance injector LS applications. This kit does not include transmission control or a handheld display.

## Discovery
- Systems: /collections/fuel, /collections/engine, /collections/drivetrain, /collections/electronics, /collections/safety
- Racing styles: /collections/no-prep, /collections/index, /collections/street-strip
- Guides: /guides
- Builds: /builds

## Commerce Status
All four reference products are marked coming soon. Do not claim live price, inventory, shipping date, or purchase availability. The planned integration keeps editorial pages on Astro/Vercel and reads commerce data from Shopify's Storefront API.

## WebMCP Tools
get_products(system?, platform?), check_fitment(application), get_categories(), find_by_race_style(style), get_guides().

## Contact
YouTube: Stroom Performance channel. General: hello@stroomperformance.com.
